title: Hoe Garden Tool, 114 cm Long Garden Hoe and Cultivator, Garden Hand Tiller with Long Handle, Heavy Duty Garden Tools Hoe Cultivator for Gardening, Weeding, Lossening Soil
features: Garden Hoe and Cultivator: 2 in 1 garden hoe and cultivator combo with adjustable handle, perfect for gardening,landscaping,weeding,seeding,loosen soil,cultivate vegetables, uproot weeds. Notice : Not for dry, hard, rocky soil or digging!
Heavy Duty: Constructed of carbon steel, this garden tool with sharp blade does most jobs around the garden,lawn. Work with the tough roots, and soft soil without bending, cracking or falling apart.

Long Handle for Stand Working: Adjust the handle length of this garden hoe and tiller in 40, 78 or 114 cm by adding or taking out extensions. 2.8 cm pole diameter makes it strong enough for heavy duty gardening work. For kids and adults, for weeds difficult to reach.
Easy to Install: Our garden hoe and cultivator takes up less space in your garage. Perfect for on the go transport and outdoor camping activities with easy assembly design.
Service: If you have any questions about the product, please feel free to contact us. We will solve it for you at the first time.
description: Product description Hoe Garden Tool, 114 cm Garden Hoe Long Handle for Weeding, Hoe Cultivator 2 in 1 Hand Garden Tools for Gardening Planting Safety Warning Do not use on dry, hard, rocky soil or for digging. This may cause damage to the tool or injury to the user.
